Module com.example.cincuentazo
Package com.example.cincuentazo.model

Class GameModel

java.lang.Object
com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
IGameModel
public class GameModel extends Object implements IGameModel
Represents the central game engine responsible for maintaining and coordinating the complete state of a Cincuentazo match.

It manages the deck, players, turn system, table cards, accumulated score, round progression, and delegates rule validation to GameRules.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Andres Felipe Rodríguez

  • Constructor Details

    • GameModel

      public GameModel(List<String> playerNames)
      Constructs a new GameModel state engine instance initialized for a fresh match.

      Allocates internal collections for the playing field and instantiates participating entities based on the provided list of identities.

      the initial entity in the list (index 0) is designated as a human player, while subsequent entries are flagged as simulated/AI participants.

      Parameters:
      playerNames - A List of strings representing the names or profiles of the players joining the room. Index 0 must represent the human user.

  • Method Details

    • startNewGame

      public void startNewGame()
      Prepares match elements, shuffles, distributes initial cards, and deals the starting card onto the table.
      Specified by:
      startNewGame in interface IGameModel

    • playTurnAction

      public void playTurnAction(Player player, Card card) throws com.example.cincuentazo.exceptions.InvalidMoveException
      Core action allowing a player to execute a move. * @param player the player committing the card action
      Specified by:
      playTurnAction in interface IGameModel
      Parameters:
      card - the selected card from hand
      player - participant performing the action
      Throws:
      com.example.cincuentazo.exceptions.InvalidMoveException - if the choice violates the 50-point safety line

    • eliminatePlayer

      public void eliminatePlayer(Player player)
      Eliminates a player and moves their remaining cards to the bottom of the deck.
      Specified by:
      eliminatePlayer in interface IGameModel
      Parameters:
      player - player to be eliminated

    • getRoundNumber

      public int getRoundNumber()
      Returns the current round number of the match.
      Returns:
      the number representing the current completed turn count.

    • getTableSum

      public int getTableSum()
      Returns the current accumulated value on the table.
      Returns:
      the current table sum.

    • getPlayers

      public List<Player> getPlayers()
      Returns the collection of players participating in the match.
      Returns:
      the list containing every player instance.

    • getTurnSystem

      public Turn getTurnSystem()
      Returns the turn management component responsible for controlling the player rotation throughout the match.
      Returns:
      the game's turn controller.

    • getDeck

      public Deck getDeck()
      Returns the deck currently used by the match.
      Returns:
      the active draw deck.

    • getTopTableCard

      public Card getTopTableCard()
      Returns the most recently played card currently visible on the table.
      Returns:
      the top card of the table pile, or null if no card is currently available.
